summary: Made a surgical opening adjustment to tie Chapter 8 more directly to Chapter 7's closing image of the sealed tier-three door and Marisol's downgraded passcard. The chapter exit already handed off cleanly into Chapter 9's aftermath, so no additional exit rewrite was needed.
edits: Anchored the opening sentence at the sealed tier-three door to strengthen the immediate transition from Chapter 7.
Kept the chapter exit intact because its visible blood, scanner, and withheld cleanup already set up Chapter 9's aftermath cleanly.
